project_privacy_data_flows.description: User unlocks app using device biometric authentication. Biometric credentials verified by Android BiometricPrompt/FingerprintManager. Encryption key stored in Android KeyStore.

flow_steps.code: const unlocked = await BiometricService.validateUser("Unlock to access your notes", "");
flow_steps.details: App lock screen triggers biometric authentication when app returns to foreground.
Native fingerprint scanner invoked. Biometric data processed by device hardware, never leaves device.
Encryption credentials stored in Android KeyStore/iOS Keychain for biometric-secured retrieval.
Biometric auth enabled state stored in MMKV.

project_privacy_data_flows.description: User sets a password or PIN for app lock. Password encrypted using libsodium and stored in MMKV.

flow_steps.code: const encrypted = (await encrypt(appLockCredentials, generatePassword())) as Cipher; CipherStorage.setMap(APPLOCK_CIPHER, encrypted);
flow_steps.details: App lock password encrypted with libsodium using derived key. Stored in MMKV cipher storage.

flow_steps.code: const key = await Sodium.deriveKey(appLockPassword, appLockCipher.salt); const decrypted = await decrypt(key, appLockCipher);
flow_steps.details: Password verified by decrypting stored cipher with derived key. Only the hash/verification is stored.

project_privacy_data_flows.description: Prevents screen capture and hides app content from recent apps list using Android FLAG_SECURE.

flow_steps.details: Android FLAG_SECURE set to prevent screenshots and hide content in recent apps.
React Native bridge calls native FLAG_SECURE method.

project_privacy_data_flows.description: Monitors app state transitions to trigger app lock when app returns from background.

flow_steps.details: AppState listener detects transition from background to foreground and triggers app lock.
Records timestamp when app enters background to enforce lock timeout.
